💌

Dear Advika

Something made just for you…

— with love 💜 —

You are the poem I never knew how to write, and this life is the story I have always wanted to tell.

✨

Rasmalai, yaad hai? I saw your story and you were wearing a blue saree…

You were looking extremely beautiful.

✨

I got amazed by watching you. It's like love at first sight…

Your elegance completely took my breath away.

✨

I knew you love me as well…

but then the situation changed.

✨

— her words —

"This line blew me up when you said that
I am happy and sad both at the same time."

✨

She said goodbye…

Bruh, why me? Something beautiful was given,
then instantly snatched away.
Akhir kinare par aakar hi naav kyo dubati hai?

✨

Do you love me, Advika? 🥺

✨

I knew it, Rasmalai! ❤️

✨

These epic words…
Kya pata…..
Na na… Na ren do…
Chodo yaar bakwas hai. Kya karna hai yaar?
Ab mai kya bolu…
"Par koi nhi rasmalai,
tum tharki nhi ho 😊"

✨

Toh number de rhi ho ki nhi? 😏

❤️

✨ 💜 ✨

That's my lady! 👑

Now send it to me…
Aur nakhare toh karna hi nhi!

Made with 💜 just for you, Advika
